title: betula finituma
intro: Betula finituma, also known as dwarf birch, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Betulaceae. The medicinal properties of Betula finituma lie in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Betula finituma include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating fever, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Betula finituma typically involve making a tea from the bark or using it in salves and creams for topical application.
